stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A flight is planned to take-off from the marked aerodrome at 10:00 UTC on Tuesday 23rd April. Consider this METAR, issued on the 22nd April:
222100Z 26010KT 9999 BKN015 Q0995.

Which of the following options is most probable on the morning of the flight?

options.a: A depression is forming on the front to the west and cloud and rain can be expected as it develops.
options.b: The depression centred at 38°N, 004°E (994 hPa) is moving rapidly west; northerly winds should be expected at the aerodrome.
options.c: Radiation fog can be expected to form at the aerodrome in the early morning as the wind decreases.
options.d: The depression centred at 54°N, 013°W (992 hPa) is moving rapidly south; southerly winds should be expected at the aerodrome.
